recommendations.title: The Other Woman
recommendations.overview: When Daniel and Isabelle invite Patrick and his new flame, Emma, to dinner, it’s with some misgivings. After all, Patrick has just dumped his ex-wife — their best friend — to run off with a much younger woman. But when the ravishing Emma appears, all

recommendations.title: The Well Digger's Daughter
recommendations.overview: It's the beginning of the WWII. South of France. Patricia, 18, is the oldest daughter of a well-digger, Pascal, who considers her a princess because of her moral qualities. She's kind, devoted. One day, she briefly meets a young man, Jacques, the son

recommendations.title: A Heart in Winter
recommendations.overview: Beautiful violin virtuoso Camille has two obsessions: the music of Ravel, and a friend of her husband's who crafts violins. But his heart seems to be as cold as her playing is passionate.

recommendations.title: A Time to Kill
recommendations.overview: A young lawyer defends a black man accused of murdering two white men who raped his 10-year-old daughter, sparking a rebirth of the KKK.

recommendations.title: Primal Fear

recommendations.title: Le Brio
recommendations.overview: After an incident, a brilliant professor known for his outbursts is forced to mentor the student he wronged for a speech contest.

recommendations.title: Conviction
recommendations.overview: Ever since she served on the jury during his trial, Nora has been convinced that Jacques Viguier is innocent, despite him being accused of murdering his wife. Following an appeal by the public prosecutor’s office, and fearing a miscarriage of justice

recommendations.title: Marius

recommendations.title: Just Mercy

recommendations.title: The Life of David Gale
recommendations.overview: A man against capital punishment is accused of murdering a fellow activist and is sent to death row.
